mnemonics.title: S.P.A.C.E. for IoT Agriculture Goals
mnemonics.content: S - Save Resources (Water), P - Increase Productivity (Yield), A - Automate processes, C - Collect data, E - Enhance decision making.

mnemonics.title: SMART Agriculture Sensors
mnemonics.content: S - Soil moisture, M - Meteorological (weather), A - Acidity (pH), R - Radiation (light/PAR), T - Temperature/humidity - the five essential sensor types for precision farming.

mnemonics.title: 3-Tier Architecture - PNA
mnemonics.content: P - Perception (sensors in the field), N - Network (gateway aggregates and forwards), A - Application (cloud analyzes and acts). Think: 'Perceive, Network, Act' - from field to cloud to action.

mnemonics.title: Agriculture IoT Challenges - PCHIC
mnemonics.content: P - Power (remote areas), C - Connectivity (rural coverage), H - Harsh environment (weather exposure), I - Interoperability (different protocols), C - Cost (initial investment). Think: 'PCHIC problems in the field'.
